PowerShell(python -c "import tkinter as tk; r=tk.Tk\(\); r.title\('Buton Uygulamasi'\); r.geometry\('400x300'\); r.configure\(bg='#2c3e50'\); tk.Label\(r, text='Butona Tiklayin', font=\('Arial',16,'bold'\), fg='white', bg='#2c3e50'\).pack\(pady=30\); tk.Button\(r, text='TIKLA', font=\('Arial',24,'bold'\), bg='#27ae60', fg='white', activebackground='#2ecc71', width=15, height=3, cursor='hand2', command=lambda: [print\('Tiklandi!'\), tk.messagebox.showinfo\('OK', 'Butona TIKLADINIZ!'\)]\).pack\(pady=40\); tk.Button\(r, text='Kapat', command=r.quit, font=\('Arial',10\), bg='#e74c3c', fg='white', width=10\).pack\(pady=10\); print\('Uygulama acik, butonu bul ve tikla'\); r.mainloop\(\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import tkinter as tk; from tkinter import messagebox; r=tk.Tk\(\); r.title\('Buton'\); r.geometry\('400x300'\); r.configure\(bg='#2c3e50'\); tk.Label\(r, text='Butona Tiklayin', font=\('Arial',16,'bold'\), fg='white', bg='#2c3e50'\).pack\(pady=30\); tk.Button\(r, text='TIKLA', font=\('Arial',24,'bold'\), bg='#27ae60', fg='white', activebackground='#2ecc71', width=15, height=3, cursor='hand2', command=lambda: [print\('TIKLANDI!'\), messagebox.showinfo\('Basarili', 'Butona TIKLADINIZ!'\)]\).pack\(pady=40\); tk.Button\(r, text='Kapat', command=r.quit, font=\('Arial',10\), bg='#e74c3c', fg='white', width=10\).pack\(pady=10\); print\('✅ UYGULAMA AÇIK - Butona tıkla!'\); r.mainloop\(\)")
